# BlogKub

> BlogKub (บล็อกคับ) เป็นเครื่องมือตกแต่งธีมบล็อก Blogger แบบฟรี ทำงาน 100% ในเบราว์เซอร์ ไม่ต้องเขียนโค้ด และไม่ต้องสมัครสมาชิก ผู้ใช้เลือกเทมเพลต ปรับสี จัดเมนู ลากวางองค์ประกอบ ดูตัวอย่างสด แล้วดาวน์โหลดไฟล์ Blogger XML ที่ถูกต้องไปอัปโหลดเข้าบล็อกของตัวเองได้ทันที ข้อมูลงานทั้งหมดถูกเก็บในเครื่องผู้ใช้เอง ไม่มีการส่งขึ้นเซิร์ฟเวอร์

BlogKub is a free, 100% client-side Blogger theme (XML) builder. Pick a template, customize colors, arrange menus, drag-and-drop blocks, preview live, then download a valid Blogger XML file — no coding and no account required. All work stays in the user's own browser.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Price: free (no premium tier, no hidden costs).
- No sign-up or login required to use the builder.
- Privacy: the tool runs entirely in the browser; project data is stored locally (there is no server that stores user data).
- Output: a downloadable `.xml` file uploaded via Blogger → Theme → Backup/Restore.
- Works with both `.blogspot.com` blogs and blogs on custom domains.
- Every generated theme ships with SEO groundwork: meta tags, Open Graph, canonical, and JSON-LD structured data.
- 8 templates: Personal, Travel, Tech, Classic + Sidebar, Magazine, Company, Online Course, Product Review.
- Language: primary content is Thai (ไทย); an English homepage is available at /en/.

## Builder & Templates
- [Visual Builder](https://www.blogkub.com/builder): drag-and-drop editor that exports Blogger XML.
- [Templates overview](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/templates): all 8 templates and how to choose the right one.

## Learn — feature guides (40+ step-by-step articles)
- [Learning Center](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/): index of every feature guide.
- [Table of Contents (TOC)](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/toc): auto table of contents from H2/H3.
- [Breadcrumb](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/breadcrumb): navigation path with JSON-LD.
- [Dark Mode](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/dark-mode): light/dark theme toggle.
- [AEO Summary Box](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/aeo): answer-first summary box that helps AI Overviews, ChatGPT and Perplexity cite the content.
- [FAQ](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/faq): FAQ block with FAQPage schema.
- [Ad Slot / AdSense](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/ad): compliant ad placement with an "Ad" label.
- [Related Posts](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/related): automatic related articles by label.
- [Theme Color Picker](https://www.blogkub.com/learn/themepicker): let readers switch theme colors.

## Blog — in-depth guides
- [Blog hub](https://www.blogkub.com/blog/): all articles.
- [Blogger SEO 2026](https://www.blogkub.com/blog/blogger-seo): rank a Blogger blog on Google, from basics to AI Search.
- [Blogger + Google AdSense](https://www.blogkub.com/blog/blogger-adsense): earn from a Blogger blog, from approval to policy-safe ad placement.
- [Start a Blogger blog](https://www.blogkub.com/blog/start-blogger-blog): create a free Blogger blog step by step with a professional theme.

## About
- [About BlogKub](https://www.blogkub.com/about): what the tool is and who it is for.
- [Contact](https://www.blogkub.com/contact): how to get in touch.

## Optional
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.blogkub.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.blogkub.com/terms)
- [XML Sitemap](https://www.blogkub.com/sitemap.xml)
